claims.evidence_text: such as wheat may have protein content between 6.9% and 22.00% (Vogel et al., 1973).
claims.claim_summary: Wheat grain protein content can range from 6.9% to 22.0% across genotypes and growing conditions.

claims.evidence_text: The majority of DH lines were grouped in ranges of 13.5% 15% protein, interval in falling and the Izvor parent, 13.7%. The other parent, F00628G-34 line, has lower protein content, 12.2%.
claims.claim_summary: Most wheat DH lines studied grouped at 13.5-15% grain protein; parent cultivar Izvor 13.7%, parent line F00628G-34 12.2%.
